brand_identity.name: School Of Commerce
brand_identity.description: A fusion of Ivy League prestige and Fintech precision. Trustworthy, authoritative, yet cutting-edge.
brand_identity.theme_strategy: Light mode default with Deep Emerald/Navy accents. Dark mode reserved for 'Trading/Night' view if needed, but primary is Light for readability.

dashboard.card_style: bg-white border border-border/60 shadow-sm rounded-xl hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium border border-primary/10
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 h-10 px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent/10 text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium

cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-card p-8 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500
cards.stat: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-white p-6 shadow-sm
cards.course: group overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-card transition-all hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-base shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts in index.css immediately.
Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (primary: emerald-900, accent: amber-600) and fonts.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customized with the 'rounded-md' and 'border-slate-200' style.
For the Dashboard, use a Sidebar Layout with a 'Glass' header.
For the Landing Page, use 'Playfair Display' for all H1/H2 headings to create the 'Old Money' academic look.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
